Location 4: 1250 4th Ave, Seattle WA 98101
   Construction: Frame  |  Year Built: (not reported)  |  Sq Ft: (not reported)  |  Mixed-Use

============================================================
SCHEDULE TOTAL INSURED VALUE: $31.8M
============================================================

Notes from insured:
- Location 4 acquired 2025. Building permit records unavailable; insured to supply
  updated year-built and square footage figures before renewal.
- All locations on blanket replacement cost basis.
- Flood excluded at Location 1 (Zone X). Earthquake DIC placed separately with
  Lloyd's syndicate (not reflected here).

Fine print:
This Statement of Values is proprietary to Pacific Realty Group Inc. and is
provided solely for the purpose of placing or renewing insurance. Values are
insured's best estimate and are subject to adjustment upon appraisal. PCCIS does
not warrant the accuracy of values provided.

                                            PCCIS - San Francisco, CA
